name: Swatch Group
description: The Swatch Group Ltd is a Swiss manufacturer of watches and jewellery. It is the world's largest watch company, owning brands across every price segment from luxury to affordable.

name: Richemont
description: Compagnie Financière Richemont SA is a Swiss luxury goods conglomerate. Its watch brands span the highest tiers of horology, known for exceptional craftsmanship and heritage.

name: LVMH
description: LVMH Moët Hennessy Louis Vuitton is a French luxury conglomerate. Its watch division includes some of the most prestigious names in haute horlogerie alongside fashion-forward timepieces.

name: Seiko Group
description: Seiko Group Corporation is a Japanese conglomerate and one of the world's most vertically integrated watch manufacturers. The group produces everything from movements to crystals in-house.

name: Citizen Group
description: Citizen Watch Co. is a Japanese electronics and watch company. Known for pioneering Eco-Drive solar technology, the group also owns several Swiss and Japanese watch brands.

name: Casio
description: Casio Computer Co., Ltd. is a Japanese multinational electronics company. In watchmaking, Casio is renowned for the virtually indestructible G-Shock line and affordable digital timepieces.

name: Titan Company
description: Titan Company Limited is an Indian luxury goods company and a subsidiary of the Tata Group, headquartered in Bengaluru. Founded in 1984, Titan is the fifth-largest integrated own-brand watch manufacturer in the world. The company operates over 2,000 retail stores across India and owns multiple watch brands including Titan, Fastrack, and Sonata.
